_meta.name: RobloxXea — Community Tools Feed
_meta.description: Auto-updating community library. In production this file is hosted at a raw GitHub URL (see CommunityTools.tsx) and re-fetched on every app launch. The shape mirrors mainTools.json so the same ToolCard component renders both feeds.

tools.name: Aimmy (Community Fork)
tools.author: Babyhamsta
tools.description: A community-maintained AI-assisted aim assist that uses a YOLO model to detect player heads. Configurable FOV, smoothing, and trigger key. Includes a one-click calibration wizard.

tools.name: Ninja Legends Auto-Farm
tools.author: RandomScriptsDev
tools.description: Fully automatic Ninja Legends farm: sells swords, buys belts, unlocks islands, and rebirths on a schedule. Tunable thresholds via a settings menu.

tools.name: Pet Sim 99 Helper
tools.author: PetSimCommunity
tools.description: Community helper for Pet Simulator 99. Auto-hatches eggs, auto-sells duplicates, auto-claims gifts, and includes a trade calculator powered by the live community price sheet.

tools.name: Blox Fruits Universal
tools.author: FruitFarmers
tools.description: Universal Blox Fruits automation: auto-farm NPCs, auto-buy fruits, auto-raid, and auto-store fruits. Supports custom farm-zone selection and race-v4 prep.

tools.name: Arsenal Silent Aim
tools.author: silentdev
tools.description: Silent-aim module tuned for Arsenal. Predicts bullet trajectory, accounts for projectile speed, and supports team-check, wall-check, and FOV sliders.

tools.name: MM2 Server Hop
tools.author: MMCommunity
tools.description: Murder Mystery 2 utility: server-hops to low-population servers for faster round farming, auto-collects coins, and includes a Sheriff/Murderer notifier.

tools.name: Universal Script Hub
tools.author: OpenHubDevs
tools.description: An open-source script hub shell with a searchable game database, favorites, and per-game module loading. Designed as a starting template for community contributors to publish their own scripts.

tools.name: Wally UI Library
tools.author: wallystherblx
tools.description: A widely used UI library for building clean tabbed settings menus. Drop-in for any script that needs a draggable, themeable control panel with toggles, sliders, dropdowns, and keybinds.

tools.name: Rayfield UI
tools.author: sirius-softworks
tools.description: A modern, animated UI library with a notification system, key-system integration, and Discord webhook support. Popular choice for community scripts that want a polished, modern look out of the box.

tools.name: Orion Library
tools.author: JailbreakV
tools.description: A minimal, fast UI library inspired by modern desktop apps. Provides tabs, sections, toggles, sliders, color pickers, and a built-in search. Zero external dependencies.

tools.name: Fluent UI
tools.author: FluentDevs
tools.description: A Windows 11 Fluent-style UI library for Roblox scripts. Includes acrylic blur effects, animated transitions, dialog system, and Themable accent colors. Designed to feel native on Windows 11.

tools.name: Universal ESP Pro
tools.author: espdev
tools.description: Advanced ESP with cham rendering, distance fade, customizable fonts, and per-team color schemes. Supports players, NPCs, and items. Optimized render loop keeps frame cost low.
